data.body: OSS BEST-PRACTICES VALIDATION (config-loop, subagent + web research vs ruff/black/mypy/pytest/pip/uv/hatch/poetry/coverage/pydantic-settings + PEP 518/621/680). VERDICT: rebar config is ABOVE the OSS median — single typed resolver; principled discovery (upward walk, stops at .git, dedicated rebar.toml > pyproject [tool.rebar], explicit $REBAR_CONFIG short-circuit); documented precedence CLI>env>project>user>defaults with defaults-applied-once (a low layer default never beats a high layer value); best-in-class env aliasing (REBAR_<SECTION>_<KEY> + deprecation alias windows with canonical-wins + warn-once + the NO_SYNC negative-flip = pydantic AliasChoices pattern); staleness-safe caching (warm hit re-stats read files; errors never cached; in-process verify-gate edits honored); and a rebar config transparency command that reuses the EXACT load_config layer assembly (provenance cannot drift) — matches/exceeds ruff --show-settings / pip config debug. FAIL-CLOSED VERIFY GATE confirmed correctly implemented (present-but-unreadable verify.* selected so _read_toml_table raises -> require signature). Intentional stdlib-only deviations (hand-rolled XDG, no pydantic-settings, no platformdirs, caching) introduce NO fundamental risk. FINDINGS: (MAJOR) the cli_overrides precedence layer is built + correct but no first-class CLI flag routes through it -> follow-up ticket cdd4-4349-4534-4473 (discovered_from a621). (MINOR, FIXED this session) relative/blank XDG_CONFIG_HOME was honored (resolved vs cwd -> non-portable); now ignored per XDG spec, falls back to ~/.config + tests; also documented that rebar uses ~/.config on ALL platforms incl. macOS (deliberate, matches ruff/black/mypy; not ~/Library/Application Support). (ENHANCEMENT/intentional) unknown-key default is WARN during the deprecation window (vs ruff/cargo fail-closed) — planned cutover flips to error via REBAR_CONFIG_UNKNOWN_KEYS; no system/XDG_CONFIG_DIRS tier — intentional non-goal for a repo-scoped tool. Net: conformant + no unhandled gotchas; one feature-completeness follow-up + minor doc note for f81a (macOS line in docs/config.md).
